title: Doctor in Distress
writer: Nicholas Phipps, Ronald Scott Thorn, Richard Gordon
actors: Dirk Bogarde, James Robertson Justice, Samantha Eggar
plot: Dr. Simon Sparrow's love life improves dramatically when lovely Delia Mallor is brought into casualty with a sprained ankle. As a model she's relieved at the diagnosis, and she's as attracted to Sparrow as he is to her. Meanwhile,...
